'''Remlout''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[X'Ting]] who served as a loyal bodyguard to [[Trillot]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Remlout knew that [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] never declined a challenge, and when she met Trillot, the bodyguard challenged the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. She accepted and vowed that she would not kill the [[X'Ting]] thug. After fighting, the bodyguard was crippled by Ventress through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
